chart.prompt: Umsatzanteile pro Vertriebskanal (Projekt) im laufenden Monat
chart.sql_string:
SELECT 
  p.name AS "Projekt",
  SUM(soi.xen_net_revenue_item_total) AS "Umsatz"
FROM sales_order_items soi
JOIN sales_orders so ON soi.sales_order_id = so.sales_order_id
JOIN projects p ON so.project_id = p.project_id
WHERE EXTRACT(YEAR FROM so.date) = EXTRACT(YEAR FROM CURRENT_DATE)
  AND EXTRACT(MONTH FROM so.date) = EXTRACT(MONTH FROM CURRENT_DATE)
  AND so.status NOT IN ('canceled', 'created')
GROUP BY p.project_id, p.name
ORDER BY "Umsatz" DESC

en.title: Channel mix (current month)
en.description: Share of revenue per sales channel for the running month — donut view of where today's revenue is coming from.

de.title: Kanal-Mix (laufender Monat)
de.description: Umsatzanteile pro Vertriebskanal im aktuellen Monat — Ringdiagramm wo der Umsatz heute herkommt.
